description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this brassiere from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look in your body-hugging outfits. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsPink brassiere with lace cups Pink lycra fabric cupping over the lace cup with crystal embellishments, that covers half the strap area with ruched fabricElasticated, adjustable shoulder strapsUnderwiring at the cupsStretchable lace wings with three-eyed double hook closureMaterial and CareLace, polyamideHand wash coldHang to dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
